children.text: Select which language the application should be in. "Automatically" means that Android decides based on your current device locale (default). Application restart required!
[Device Default] Set the default locale that the browser will use online.
InBrowser run in the background, but hidden from recent apps. Continue the app using the icon. Exit the app using the exit-button.
[Disabled] Set a time-limit for how long Run in Background is active.
Run application in fullscreen mode. This hides the Android notifications/status-bar when you're browsing.
Enable plugins such as Flash (flash plugin need to be installed) etc.
